basic_details.job_title: Mumbai Port Authority Paramedical Staff Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 16 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Mumbai Port Authority has officially announced the Paramedical Staff Recruitment 2026 with 16 openings. The detailed notification was published on 20-05-2026 at mumbaiport.gov.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 35 years and hold the required General Nursing Midwifery Course/BSC Nursing, Diploma in Radiography/Radiological Technology or BSC in Radiography/Medical Imaging Technology, Standard Xth passed with Certificate of Wound Dressing or Theatre Assistant qualifications can now attend the walk-in interview on 22-05-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply a

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: Relaxable as per Reservation Rules of Central Government.

qualification.education_qualification: General Nursing Midwifery Course/ BSC Nursing, Diploma in Radiography/Radiological Technology or BSC in Radiography/ Medical Imaging Technology, Standard Xth passed with Certificate of Wound Dressing or Theatre Assistant
qualification.details: Nursing Associates: General Nursing Midwifery Course/ BSC Nursing, Updated Registration as Qualified General Nurse and Midwife with Maharashtra Nursing Council, Age below 35 years. Radiology Technician: Diploma in Radiography/ Radiological Technology (2-3 years after 10+2) or BSC in Radiography/ Medical Imaging Technology from recognised university or college or After passing Xth Standard, two years MCVC in X-Ray Technology from University/ College or Equivalent qualification in Radiography/ Medical Imaging from recognized State or Central Government Institute (AERB), Knowledge of Radiation Safety Protocols, Age below 35 years. Operation Theatre Assistant (Female/ Male): Standard Xth passed, Should be able to understand English, Marathi & Hindi, Age Below 35 years. Dresser (Female/ Male): Standard Xth passed, Holding a Certificate of Wound Dressing from a recognised Medical Institute/ Hospital, Should be able to understand English, Marathi & Hindi, Age Below 35 years.

salary_details.details: Nursing Associates: Rs. 30,000 Per Month Radiology Technician: Rs. 30,000 Per Month Operation Theatre Assistant (Female/ Male): Rs. 25,000 Per Month Dresser (Female/ Male): Rs. 23,000 Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Mumbai Port Authority Paramedical Staff posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Paramedical Staff posts at Mumbai Port Authority is scheduled for 22 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Paramedical Staff at Mumbai Port Authority?
faq.answer: There are a total of 16 vacancies for various Paramedical Staff positions at the Mumbai Port Authority, including Nursing Associates, Radiology Technicians, Operation Theatre Assistants, and Dressers.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Nursing Associates post?
faq.answer: For the Nursing Associates post, candidates must have completed a General Nursing Midwifery Course or BSC Nursing and possess updated registration with the Maharashtra Nursing Council.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Paramedical Staff posts is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Central Government's reservation rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Paramedical Staff positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 23,000 to Rs. 30,000 per month, depending on the specific post. Nursing Associates and Radiology Technicians can expect Rs. 30,000, while Operation Theatre Assistants will receive Rs. 25,000, and Dressers will get Rs. 23,000.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Mumbai Port Authority recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Paramedical Staff posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification to assess the candidates' suitability for the roles.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for Mumbai Port Authority Paramedical Staff posts going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Mumbai Port Authority office. The exact address and reporting time will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions for Paramedical Staff at Mumbai Port Authority are on a contract basis.
